{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317443426A835CFA509F98D3B6A"}"},"total":437},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612326186699064089","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看。完全女本位哦。大大是真爱女主。不像有的伪女本位文看似女主得利实则权利在男的那，这个文是完完全全的主动权在女主手里。女主控可以放心入。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772385859,"group_id":"7567671967189322814","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9xufMecQPM9ssGNptINneA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"860283153157563","user_name":"喜欢洞箫的杨大少"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"860283153157563","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7567671967189322814","book_info":{"abstract":"【理智疯批真恶女+身心全不洁+无固定Cp+vN+三观细碎+非传统万人迷+男人清醒中沉沦】
白鸢日常口头禅：
“与人斗其乐无穷”
“我只是想多个男朋友，我有什么错？”
“废物才做选择，我，全都要。”
“喜欢的人放床上就行了，放心里多少有点内耗了。”
“所有男朋友里，我最喜欢你。”
“知道我坏，还喜欢吗？”
--
她喜欢看上位者在自己面前低头，喜欢看理智者对她失控，喜欢看高傲者对她祈求，强势者对她百般温柔，喜欢看他们对自己逐渐沉沦。
她贪婪、恶劣，可他们最后明知她是坏女人，还是深陷其中。
--
①：爬床上位心机女
一边调教老公，一边花老公的钱在外面包养小奶狗。
②：嚣张跋扈贵妃
她贴在男人宽厚的脊背上，语气委屈：“陛下最近总是忙于国事，王爷你帮帮我。”
③：吃爱情票的女主播
“白鸢，你若再不见我，我就把我们的关系告诉你老公和你男朋友。”
④：校霸、学神、哥哥、她
“白鸢，我不是你哥哥，我们没有血缘关系。”
⑤：末日心机婊和她的杀神小队
“队长，嫂子真漂亮。”
⑥：绿茶圣体小师妹
“白鸢，为师要这整个修仙界，所有人都高看你一眼。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d2f07eefb98ee30e124ba03bf072b508","author":"释倒倒","author_id":"","book_id":"7567671967189322814","book_name":"快穿：明知我是坏女人，还喜欢？","book_short_name":"妖言惑众","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7567724446060905022","read_count":"83083","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"582585"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"273","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,总裁,娱乐圈,豪门世家","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/079f0d84f341fee23ad396fe8d0b1e85~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443074&x-signature=Q1cpAgAiEbg0R6ECsHEaGFclWtE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52777290532","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"256"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317443426A835CFA509F98D3B6A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"l
